debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hm : @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f
he : @CategoryInContext.Category.split_epi α C X Y f
⊢ IsIso f

proof:
rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  use g
  constructor
  · exact hg
  · apply hepi
    rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
failed_attempts:
rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm (by rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hm
  simp [assoc, hg]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hgf : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp]
  exact ⟨g, hg, hgf⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have he_f : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply he_f
  simp only [comp_id, assoc, hg, id_comp]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  exact ⟨g, hg, hepi (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_, hg⟩
  apply hm
  rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm _ _ (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have : g ≫ f = id Y := hm (by rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp])
  exact ⟨g, hg, this⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  -- Note: Based on standard category theory, split_epi f implies existence of a section g (g ≫ f = id).
  -- However, the provided definition of split_epi uses IsRetraction defined as f ≫ g = id.
  -- The theorem "Mono + Split Epi -> Iso" is true if Split Epi means "has a section".
  -- Assuming the standard meaning for the theorem to hold despite the definitions in the file:
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  -- We have f ≫ g = id (from hg). We need g ≫ f = id.
  -- We use Mono f (right cancellable).
  -- f ≫ (g ≫ f) = (f ≫ g) ≫ f = id ≫ f = f = f ≫ id
  apply hm
  simp only [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hm _ _ (by simp [← assoc, hg]), hg⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  simp only [comp_id, ← assoc, hg, id_comp]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have : g ≫ f = id Y := hm (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])
  exact ⟨g, hg, this⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    simp only [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, this⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm _ _ (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp]⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, by
    apply hm
    simp only [← assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp]⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hm
  rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  simp [Category.assoc, hg]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply this
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm _ _ (by simp [assoc, hg])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm (by simp only [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
successful_attempts:
rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  use g
  constructor
  · exact hg
  · apply hepi
    rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  exists g
  constructor
  · exact hg
  · apply hepi
    rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  dsimp [Category.IsRetraction] at hg
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hepi : Epi f := Category.retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hepi
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
